Appearance

KUKA KRL ProfessionalThe definitive industrial development suite for KUKA Robot Language.

Professional-grade IDE & LSP support built for KRC4 & KRC5 robotics. Engineered for speed and safety.

Get Started
Buy Pro License

Interactive Flowchart Viewer

Turn massive, complex .src programs into visual, clean control-flow diagrams. Bidirectional navigation and SVG export.

Industrial-Grade Diagnostics

Catch syntax crashes and physical collision risks before you run the code. Strict block balance and collision guard.

Workspace-Wide Analysis

Automated Code Quality Reports and Dead-Code detection. Ensure your code meets the high standards of automotive manufacturers.

Offline-First Architecture

Built for factory floors. Activate once and work completely offline without losing access to Premium features.
